target.title: User-home system prompt is rendered as developer instructions

target.title: Missing user-home system prompt is omitted
target.test: buildContext must omit developer_instructions when .ndx/system-promt.md is absent, while retaining model instructions.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "developer instructions are omitted when system prompt is absent".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

target.passCriteria: No developer_instructions section is emitted and the model instruction section is still present.

target.title: buildContext returns developer and user strings with environment metadata
target.test: buildContext must return one developer string and one user string; user context must include cwd, shell, current date, and timezone from session metadata.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "buildContext returns one developer string and one user string".
